group.name: Which Skyrim version are you on?

plugin.name: Skyrim SE / AE (stable — recommended)
plugin.description: The tested build. Installs SNBaka_UI.dll built with CommonLibSSE-NG for Skyrim Special Edition (1.5.97) and Anniversary Edition (1.6.x). Choose this unless you are on Skyrim VR.

plugin.name: Skyrim VR (EXPERIMENTAL — DLL not included)
plugin.description: EXPERIMENTAL / UNTESTED. Installs everything EXCEPT the SKSE plugin DLL. No VR build of SNBaka_UI.dll is shipped yet, so the mod will NOT fully work on VR until a community-built VR DLL is placed in SKSE/Plugins/SNBaka_UI.dll. A HOW_TO_GET_VR_DLL.txt note is installed in that folder. The C++ source is on GitHub (dll-source/) and uses only runtime-portable CommonLibSSE-NG APIs, so a VR build is feasible. Note: SkyrimNet and PrismaUI must also support VR.
